mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TBL_COM_WAREHOUSE
WAREHOUSENAME LIKE #{search}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_WAREHOUSE ( WAREHOUSECODE, PLANTCD, WAREHOUSENAME, USEYN, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM ) VALUES ( #{WAREHOUSECODE}, #{PLANTCD}, #{WAREHOUSENAME}, #{USEYN}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_COM_WAREHOUSE SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE WAREHOUSECODE = #{WAREHOUSECODE}
